name: agent-hub
description: Local-first Agent Hub control plane and dashboard

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @agent-hub/shared && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-hub/shared" "npm run dev -w @agent-hub/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-hub/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-hub/shared && npm run build -w @agent-hub/sdk && npm run build -w @agent-hub/server && npm run build -w @agent-hub/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agent-hub/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agent-hub/server && npm run typecheck -w @agent-hub/web && npm run typecheck -w @agent-hub/sdk
